name: brewbar-pos
description: BrewBar POS — juice bar point-of-sale system

scripts.install:all: npm run install:client && npm run install:desktop
scripts.build:pos: cd client && npx ng build pos --configuration production
scripts.build:admin: cd client && npx ng build admin --configuration production
scripts.build:client: npm run build:pos && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:electron: node -e "try{fs.renameSync('build/electron/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar','build/electron/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar.old')}catch{}; fs.rmSync('build/electron',{recursive:true,force:true,maxRetries:3,retryDelay:1000})" && cd desktop && npm install && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:msi: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const {execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync(`dotnet build installer/BrewBar.Installer.wixproj -c Release -p:ProductVersion=${v}.0`,{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.kill:processes: taskkill /f /im "BrewBar POS.exe" >nul 2>&1 & taskkill /f /im "BrewBar.API.exe" >nul 2>&1 & taskkill /f /im electron.exe >nul 2>&1 || exit 0
scripts.build:desktop: npm run kill:processes && npm run build:api && npm run build:client && npm run build:copy-wwwroot && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:installer: npm run build:desktop && npm run build:msi
scripts.build:installer:inno: npm run build:desktop && npm run build:inno
scripts.integration:test: npm run integration:up && cd client && npm run e2e:integration; cd .. && npm run integration:down
